title: S8: Provider Dependency Model (required/optional + reason)
intent: Change provider_dependencies from ReadonlyArray<CapabilityType> to ReadonlyArray<ProviderDependency> where ProviderDependency is { type: CapabilityType, required: boolean, reason: string }. Update composition resolver, authority validator, module-loader validator, and manifest hashing to handle the new shape. Update all three provider manifests with real dependency declarations. Add a queryable dependency satisfaction function so UI layers can determine which modules have unmet required dependencies. No UI changes, no provider execute implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
